blended.narrative: Hunter Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 57°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 50°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
